Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC.'S Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs Of Suit IS Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will sign the proposed Order and Amended Judgment submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
*ORDER AND AMENDED JUDGMENT SIGNED AFTER HEARING*

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorney Fees And Costs Of Suit
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION 'S MOTION For Attorney Fees And Costs Of Suit IS Continued to December 18, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Vacated

Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted without leave to amend. Defendant's discovery admissions demonstrate that plaintiff is entitled to judgment. No opposition was filed. (Order and Judgment signed after hearing.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
